[cron:338d3865-d7d2-4380-be53-3305d1b98643 Sai Forge Memory Sync] Memory sync task: Read your memory files. Update memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md (today's date) with any new Colosseum results, zone action completions, judge calibration updates, or important context from recent work. Save everything worth remembering. Reply with a brief summary of what you updated.
Current time: Tuesday, February 24th, 2026 — 3:00 AM (America/New_York)

content.thinking:
I need to perform a memory sync task for Sai Forge. This involves:

1. Reading my memory files to understand what I've done recently
2. Updating memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md (today's date, which is 2026-02-24) with any new work
3. Looking for Colosseum results, zone action completions, judge calibration updates, or important context

Let me start by searching my memory to see what recent work has been done, then check what memory files exist, and finally update today's memory file.

First, let me search memory for recent work:

content.text: I'll perform the memory sync by checking my recent work and updating today's memory file.

results.snippet:
39. Get Sean to score 10 real conversations as ground truth calibration. Gap between Sean's scores 
and judge scores = contamination measurement.  [Technical Architecture]

⚠

 REQUIRES SEAN'S DIRECT INPUT

40. Build meta-judge whose only job is evaluating whether judges are improving — tracking if judge 
scores become more predictive of real-world outcomes over time.  [Technical Architecture]
41. Implement real-world outcome correlation: connect Coliseum scores to Bland AI call outcomes. If 
high Coliseum score + low conversion = scoring system is broken.  [Technical Architecture]
42. Implement 24/7 continuous recalibration: every real call outcome feeds back into scoring model. 
Judges evo

Source: memory/zone-action-register.md#L142-L164
